data.title: Ethereum blockchain game Ember Sword announced its closure due to lack of funds, setting a record of $200 million in NFT sales
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum blockchain game "Ember Sword" due to lack of operating funds, the developer Bright Star Studio announced the permanent closure of the game server and restricted the relevant Discord community permissions.
The project once earned more than $203 million in revenue through the sale of virtual land NFTs at its peak in 2021, attracting about 35,000 players to participate, and the advisory lineup includes former Blizzard Chief Creative Officer Rob Pardo and other industry veterans. Despite the launch of closed testing in July 2024 and migration to the Ethereum Layer2 network Mantle, it has not been able to reverse the decline.
At present, the market value of its game token EMBER has fallen to about $80,000, a drop of more than 96% from its peak. (Decrypt)

data.title: The address suspected to be the same whale spent $4.41 million and bought 2.74 million Fartcoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, two newly created wallets (suspected to belong to the same whale) transferred $4.41 million USDC to the Solana network through the cross-chain bridge today, and bought 2.74 million Fartcoins at a unit price of $1.61, with a cumulative transaction amount of approximately $4.41 million.
Odaily reminds users that the price of meme coins fluctuates greatly, and investors should pay attention to risks.

data.title: Meteora is now officially integrated into OKX Wallet
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website, Meteora has now been officially connected to OKX Wallet. Users can seamlessly access Meteora through OKX Wallet and participate in on-chain services such as liquidity provision.
It is reported that Meteora is a DeFi project on the Solana chain, focusing on creating an efficient, sustainable and flexible liquidity layer for the Solana ecosystem. OKX Wallet is the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, which has supported more than 130 popular public chains and provides a seamless experience of App, plug-ins, web pages and Telegram Mini wallets, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.

data.title: Chainge Users Face Prolonged Fund Lockup Amid Unfulfilled Promises
data.description:
According to PANews, the cross-chain DeFi project Chainge has been under scrutiny as users report being unable to access their funds for several months, with promised solutions yet to materialize. The project, led by Multichain founder DJ Qian, functions as both a cross-chain bridge and a decentralized exchange. Since late 2024 to early 2025, numerous users have complained about transaction delays, particularly with the cross-chain issues involving wrapped Kaspa (wKAS).

The Chainge team attributes the liquidity shortage to 'malicious actors abusing the service,' but the wKAS has significantly depegged, and the partnership with 'kas.fyi' has ended. On March 24, the project team assured users that the issues would be '100% resolved,' yet as of May 22, no resolution has been achieved. The front-end interface still allows cross-chain transactions, posing a risk of further fund absorption. Protos has reached out to the Chainge team for comments but has not received a response.

data.title: mETH becomes the first liquid staking token to be included in the balance sheet of a listed company
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Mantle official news, Republic Technologies (@republictech_io), the Ethereum treasury platform under Canadian listed company Beyond Medical Technologies Inc., has converted its ETH holdings into mETH through the mETH protocol, making mETH the first liquid pledge token included in the balance sheet of a listed company.
Mantle said that this move demonstrated the advantages of mETH in terms of institutional-level returns, security and composability. In the future, it will continue to build highly resilient and scalable infrastructure through the mETH protocol to promote the widespread use of Ethereum in regulated markets.
